headline: A Look At Uber Technologies (UBER) Valuation After New Travel Features And Autonomous Fleet Partnership
summary: Uber Technologies (UBER) just rolled out in app hotel bookings with Expedia and deepened its autonomous fleet work through a new Hertz Oro Mobility partnership, moves that reinforce its push toward an integrated travel and rides platform. See our latest analysis for Uber Technologies. Despite the steady stream of product launches, partnerships and legal headlines in recent weeks, Uber’s share price return has been mixed, with a 4.76% one-month gain but a 9.34% year-to-date decline. headline: From AMD To Disney, The Wall Street Week Ahead Is Packed
summary: Wall Street Week Ahead: key earnings (AMD, Pfizer and Disney); jobs and quarterly GDP numbers will be released. Read here for more details.

headline: Uber wants to turn its millions of drivers into a sensor grid for self-driving companies
summary: Praveen Neppalli Naga, Uber's chief technology officer, revealed the plan in an interview at TechCrunch's StrictlyVC event in San Francisco on Thursday night, describing it as a natural extension of a nascent program the company announced in late January called AV Labs.

headline: Soylent founder’s latest bet is on insurance for robots
summary: In the not-so-distant future, humanoid robots will fold your laundry, weed your garden and feed your dog. This is the world Justice Laub, CEO of Boop, is counting on with the launch of his new insurance technology company for humanoid robots. “Soon, robots are going to be everywhere,” said Laub. Alongside Rob Rhinehart, the founder of meal replacement company Soylent, and Alex Hoenigmann, a former marketer at Red Bull, Laub founded the insurtech startup for non-human companions in November and i
